markets.question: Will Manchester City FC win on 2026-03-11?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for March 11, 2026
If Manchester City FC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Real Madrid CF vs. Manchester City FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming UEFA Champions League game, scheduled for Wednesday, March 11, 2026 between Real Madrid CF and Manchester City FC.

markets.question: Will global temperature increase by less than 1.10ºC in March 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the value reported by the Global Land-Ocean Temperature Index for March 2026 when it is released.

An anomaly within a named bracket for March 2026 is necessary and sufficient to resolve this market immediately once the data becomes available, regardless of whether the figure for March 2026 is later revised.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the figure found in the table titled "GLOBAL Land-Ocean Temperature Index in 0.01 degrees Celsius" under the column "Mar" in the row "2026" (https://data.giss.nasa.gov/gistemp/tabledata_v4/GLB.Ts+dSST.txt).

If NASA’s “Global Temperature Index” is rendered permanently unavailable, other information from NASA may be used.
If no information for February 2026 is provided by NASA by May 1, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest range bracket.

markets.question: Spread: FK Bodø/Glimt (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming UEFA Champions League game, scheduled for March 11 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "FK Bodø/Glimt" if FK Bodø/Glimt win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Sporting CP".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:
In the upcoming UEFA Champions League game between FK Bodø/Glimt and Sporting CP, scheduled for March 11 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FK Bodø/Glimt and Sporting CP combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Real Madrid CF vs. Manchester City FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the UEFA Champions League game, scheduled for March 11 at 4:00 PM ET.
